image:image.image:title: ThunderStudy — India's #1 Free Study Platform
image:image.image:caption: ThunderStudy: 100% free CBSE Class 12, CUET 2026, UPSC, SSC, JEE, NEET study material. No ads, no login.

image:image.image:title: ThunderStudy Logo
image:image.image:caption: ThunderStudy — Free Study Platform for Indian Students

image:image.image:title: Free CUET 2026 Mock Tests — ThunderStudy
image:image.image:caption: Full-length CUET 2026 mock tests with real exam pattern, auto-scoring and analysis. Free, no login.

image:image.image:title: CBSE Class 12 Commerce Notes — ThunderStudy

image:image.image:title: CBSE Class 12 Science Notes — ThunderStudy

image:image.image:title: Free SSC CGL Mock Tests — ThunderStudy

image:image.image:title: Free Banking Mock Tests IBPS SBI — ThunderStudy
image:image.image:caption: Free IBPS PO, SBI PO, IBPS Clerk and SBI Clerk mock tests with real CBT interface.

image:image.image:title: GK MindMaster — Best Free GK Book for All Competitive Exams
image:image.image:caption: GK MindMaster: Best free GK book for SSC, UPSC, Railways and Banking. Direct PDF download at ThunderStudy.
